name: Orange Basil Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 cup peeled and diced seedless cucumber (1/4 inch dice)
1 cup seeded and diced ripe plum tomatoes (1/4 inch dice)
salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Toss gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Cover the bowl and let the mixture rest at room temperature for at least 1 hour before serving.
4. If using canned black beans, rinse and drain them thoroughly before adding to the bowl.
Note: Per serving, this recipe contains approximately 182 calories, 18 grams of carbohydrates, 6 grams of protein, 11 grams of fat, and no cholesterol.
